basic_details.job_title: MMRCL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 24 Assistant, Jr Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mumbai Metro Rail Corporation Limited (MMRCL), a Joint Venture company of the Government of India and Government of Maharashtra, has released Recruitment Advertisement 2026-02 for qualified and experienced professionals across 19 different post categories.

qualification.details: Age Relaxation: SC/ST – 5 years | OBC (NCL) – 3 years | PWD – up to 10 years | Ex-Servicemen – 5 years. Age is relaxable for internal/deputation candidates.

how_to_apply: Visit the official MMRCL website: https://corporate.mmrcl.com → Careers → MMRCL Recruitment Advertisement 2026-02.
Register and fill out the online application form carefully. No other mode of application will be accepted.
Upload scanned copies of your updated Resume, passport-size photograph (.jpg/.jpeg), and recent pay slip (.pdf).
Clearly indicate whether applying for Regular, Contract, or Deputation basis.

Candidates from Government departments must also send a hard copy of their application with NOC, ACRs/APARs of the last 5 years, vigilance clearance, and penalty certificate to: General Manager (HR & Admin), Mumbai Metro Rail Corporation Limited, MMRCL–Line 3 Transit Office, E Block, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (East), Mumbai – 400051.

faq.question: Q1. What is MMRCL Recruitment 2026 – Advertisement 2026-02?
faq.answer: MMRCL Recruitment 2026 under Advertisement 2026‑02 is a hiring drive by Mumbai Metro Rail Corporation Limited for 24 posts across 19 categories from General Manager to Assistant (IT). The appointments will be made on Regular, Contract (mostly 5 years) or Deputation basis depending on the post.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in MMRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 24 vacancies have been announced across 19 different post categories, including General Manager, Deputy General Manager, Assistant General Manager, Manager (Finance), Deputy Engineer, Assistant Manager, Systems Analyst/Jr. Engg‑I, Draftsman, Junior Engineer‑II (S&T) and Assistant (IT).

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for MMRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online registration starts on 27th May 2026 (10:00 Hrs.) and closes on 26th June 2026 (23:59 Hrs.). The eligibility cut‑off date for age, qualification and experience is 1st May 2026, and applications submitted after the closing date will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What are the pay scales for MMRCL 2026 posts?
faq.answer: Pay scales are as per IDA pattern: E8 (GM): ₹1,20,000 – 2,80,000 E5 (DGM): ₹80,000 – 2,20,000 E4 (AGM): ₹70,000 – 2,00,000 E3 (Manager): ₹60,000 – 1,80,000 E2 (Dy. Engineer/Assistant Manager): ₹50,000 – 1,60,000 W7 (Systems Analyst/Jr. Engg‑I): ₹40,320 – 77,540 W6 (Draftsman/Jr. Engineer‑II): ₹35,280 – 67,920 W5 (Assistant IT): ₹34,020 – 64,310.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for MMRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age varies by grade as on 1st May 2026: General Manager (E8): 53 years DGM/AGM (E5–E4): 40 years Manager (E3): 35 years Deputy Engineer/Assistant Manager (E2): 35 years Systems Analyst/Jr. Engg‑I (W7): 40 years Draftsman/Jr. Engineer‑II/Assistant (W5–W6): 35 years. Relaxations: SC/ST – 5 years, OBC (NCL) – 3 years, PwD – up to 10 years, Ex‑Servicemen – 5 years, with further relaxation for internal/deputation candidates as per rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for MMRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process is shortlisting followed by Personal Interview: Applications are shortlisted based on eligibility, educational qualifications and relevant post‑qualification experience. Shortlisted candidates are called for a Personal Interview at MMRCL’s office in Bandra Kurla Complex, Mumbai. Final selection is made on merit, subject to medical fitness and verification of documents.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any bond or service agreement for selected candidates in MMRCL?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates appointed on Regular/Contract basis must execute a Surety Bond ranging roughly from ₹1,00,000 to ₹4,00,000 depending on the grade, as per MMRCL’s Surety & Training Cost Recovery Bond Policy. The bond is not applicable to candidates joining on Deputation.

faq.question: Q8. What experience is required for various MMRCL posts?
faq.answer: Post‑qualification experience (as on 1st May 2026) is mandatory and differs by level: GM (E8): 18 years in Govt/PSU or 20 years in Private with minimum CTC ₹30 Lakhs. DGM (E5): 12 years in Govt/PSU or 14 years Private with CTC ₹18 Lakhs. AGM/Manager (E4/E3): 9/6 years in Govt/PSU or 11 years Private with CTC ₹15 Lakhs. Dy. Engineer/Assistant Manager (E2): 5 years Govt/PSU or 7 years Private with CTC ₹10 Lakhs. W‑grade posts: 2–10 years depending on degree/diploma and Govt/Private background as per the advertisement.
